nasb.text: And he said to Balak, “Stand here beside your burnt offering while I myself meet the Lord over there.”

esv.text: Balaam said to Balak, “Stand here beside your burnt offering, while I meet the Lord over there.”

cnv.text: 巴蘭對巴勒說：“你要在這裡站在你的燔祭旁邊，等我到那邊去迎見耶和華。”

ccb.text: 巴兰对巴勒说：“你留在这些燔祭旁边，我到那边去见耶和华。”
